name: Hall of Scales
M: w w w w w   w w w w w
w     w d<    w d>  w
w   w   w w   w     w
w d≤      w   w w   w
w w w w aPw     w   w
w   w w w   w w w   w
w w w   w w w M\    w
w w w   w w w w w w w

d<.task: {d<} is the _ruby rune of the lower_, giving 1 where the value on its left ranks beneath the value on its right, and 0 otherwise. Two ranks of ice-crystals are set to judgement, the readings `a` against the rivals `b` — mark where each `a` stands lower than the crystal it faces.

d≤.task: {d≤} is the _ruby rune of at-most_, giving 1 where what lies on its left does not exceed what lies on its right. Mark where each reading `r` stands no higher than its warden-mark `w`.

d≥.task: {d≥} is the _ruby rune of at-least_, giving 1 where what lies on its left is not surpassed by what lies on its right. Mark where each reading `r` reaches or clears the threshold `t`.

d>.task: {d>} is the _ruby rune of the higher_, giving 1 where the value on its left overtops the value on its right, and 0 otherwise. Mark where each reading `a` rises above the rival `b` it faces.

d⊃.task: {d⊃} is the _ruby rune of picking_, lifting from the hoard on its right the single item whose place is named on its left. A row of frost-sealed chests `c` lines the vault — draw out the `n`th.

M\\.task: {M\} is the _sapphire rune of scanning_ — set to the right of a rune, it sweeps that rune through the ever-growing prefixes of the list on its right, leaving a trail of running results. Drawing on {d+}, tally the running total of the tribute `t`, coin upon coin.

aP.task:
The Hall of Scales weighs every reading against its rival. _Transform_ the pair into a verdict: 1 where `a` outweighs `b`, ¯1 where `a` is the lighter, and 0 where the two balance.

With `a` of `3 5 4 8 6` against `b` of `3 4 5 3 9`, the verdict reads `0 1 ¯1 1 ¯1`.
